title: pavonia humifusa
intro: Pavonia humifusa, also known as Rockrose or Lowly Mallow, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family, characterized by its small, pink to purple flowers and heart-shaped leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments such as skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Pavonia humifusa include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of colds and fever, and support wound healing. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Pavonia humifusa include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which are used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
